TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Taromak = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Taromak. 493 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,388 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 1,235 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 153 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai74%, Paiwan4%, Amis3%, Bunun1%, Puyuma3%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = taɾomak = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ taɾomak. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai**%, paiwan*%, amis*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Taromak = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Taromak. 493 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,388 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 1,235 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 153 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Rukai74%, Paiwan4%, Amis3%, Bunun1%, Puyuma3%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = taɾomak = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ taɾomak. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, ɾukai**%, paiwan*%, amis*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
